name: Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life. Perfect for travel or focused work.

name: Minimalist Leather Watch
description: Elegant timepiece featuring a genuine leather strap, quartz movement, and water resistance up to 30 meters.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker
description: Monitor your heart rate, sleep, and daily activities. Includes a high-resolution AMOLED display.

name: Eco-Friendly Yoga Mat
description: Premium non-slip yoga mat made from 100% natural, biodegradable rubber. Includes carrying strap.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Maker
description: Hand-crafted ceramic dripper that ensures an even extraction for the perfect cup of coffee every morning.

name: Ultra-Lightweight Tent
description: Compact, two-person tent designed for backpacking. Features weather-resistant fabric and easy setup.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with RGB backlighting, tactile switches, and a durable aluminum frame.

name: Travel Duffel Bag
description: Water-resistant canvas bag with multiple compartments, a shoe pocket, and detachable shoulder strap.

name: Aromatherapy Essential Oil Diffuser
description: Ultrasonic diffuser with 7 LED color lights, auto shut-off, and whisper-quiet operation.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Insulated water bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. BPA-free.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof speaker with 360-degree sound, built-in mic, and a 12-hour playtime.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: High-back mesh chair with adjustable lumbar support, headrest, and armrests for maximum comfort.
